title: nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.

- Upgrade to 2.2.57
- Use global DNS even for static IP with static DNS. (RHEL-126730)
- Add libreswan leftprotoport and rightprotoport support. (RHEL-130911
